accepted.reason: Permutation-based cube state transitions and move parsing provide compact combinatorial state-manipulation kernels.
Forward-phase Gaussian elimination loop nest is a foundational numerical kernel for optimization tasks.
Tree navigation/manipulation operations are portable data-structure routines with clear control flow.
Multiple bitstream float-decoding branches provide practical low-level parsing logic and numeric transforms.
Multivariate polynomial term multiplication is a clean tensor-index arithmetic kernel.
Bounding-box overlap computation is a high-value vision kernel with nested loops and branch-heavy geometry logic.

skipped.reason: Deeply coupled to Sage symbolic internals and extension types, reducing standalone portability.
Large project-specific preprocessing pipeline with external dependencies and domain assumptions; lower reuse as standalone GRPO target.
Audio-engine integration depends on project-specific wavetable/buffer internals rather than portable independent kernels.
Cython compiler/runtime behavior test file, not a reusable optimization example.
